## Summary

Describe the change clearly and in one or two sentences.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release preparation

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated where needed
- [ ] Local tests passed
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] No config or environment changes required
- [ ] Config or environment changes are required and documented

## Checklist

- [ ] Targets the correct base branch (`dev`, `staging`, `release/*`, or `main`)
- [ ] Follows project conventions
- [ ] Avoids unrelated changes
